name: Cold dark dungeon stone floor surface viewed from high top-down. Weathered ancient charcoal granite, base color #3A3D42 cool grey, deeper crevices #252830, occasional subtle cold blue rim #7BA7BC microcracks. Pebble grain texture, hairline microcracks scattered organically, NO baked light, NO directional shadow, NO vignette. Salt and Sanctuary dark gritty palette. NO warm brown, NO yellow, NO green. → Cold dark dungeon stone wall edge viewed from high top-down — slightly raised wall blocks with vertical rim shadow on the side facing camera. Charcoal granite blocks #3A3D42 with darker crevices #252830 between stones, subtle cold blue #7BA7BC rim highlight on top edge, mortar gaps visible. Wall reads as raised barrier from above with minimal vertical extrusion (TOP-DOWN not isometric). NO brown tones, NO warm colors, NO baked lighting.
lower_description: Cold dark dungeon stone floor surface viewed from high top-down. Weathered ancient charcoal granite, base color #3A3D42 cool grey, deeper crevices #252830, occasional subtle cold blue rim #7BA7BC microcracks. upper_description: Cold dark dungeon stone wall edge viewed from high top-down — slightly raised wall blocks with vertical rim shadow on the side facing camera. Charcoal granite blocks #3A3D42 with darker crevices #252830 between stones, subtle cold blue #7BA7BC rim highlight on top edge, mortar gaps visible. Wall reads as raised barrier from above with minimal vertical extrusion (TOP-DOWN not isometric). NO brown tones, NO warm colors, NO baked lighting.
transition_description: Wall base meets floor with broken stone debris and fallen masonry chunks scattered along the edge, dirt accumulation in the crevice between wall and floor, occasional hairline cold blue rift crack at the boundary. Asymmetric organic boundary, no straight line.

pattern_system.description: 4×4 patterns with wildcards for flexible tile matching

pattern_layout.description: 4×4 grid where center 2×2 matches tile corners, outer ring uses wildcards

example.row_1: Wildcard + NW corner + NE corner + Wildcard
example.row_2: Wildcard + SW corner + SE corner + Wildcard

usage.description: Sample 4×4 terrain around tile position, encode as pattern key, lookup in cache
